description: You are a satellite communications technician at a NOAA ground station in White Sands, New Mexico. You have inherited a poorly maintained GPredict installation that needs cleanup and reconfiguration. Delete the leftover modules TestModule1 and TestModule2. Add ground stations for White Sands, NM (32.5007 N, 106.6086 W, 1219m) and Wallops Island, VA (37.9402 N, 75.4664 W, 12m). Create a new module named LEO_Comms for tracking LEO communication satellites including ISS (ZARYA) (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), AO-92 (43137), CAS-4A (42761), and CAS-4B (42759). Set the White Sands ground station as the module-specific QTH for LEO_Comms and update the global default ground station to White Sands. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
